title: Qian Feng
content:
Was accepted as Zhuque Zi's disciple because of being his master's descendant. He has the same talent and look similar to Qian Pinghai.

The male wasn’t very handsome, but he emitted a slightly evil aura. However, this evil aura didn’t irritate people. Instead, it made people feel a strange intimacy toward him.

Devoured 
Hongdie
's domain and made her a (sex) slave of him 
[
1
]
.

She was his third Cultivation Furnace 
[
1
]

Also has a deep desire to turn his Junior Sister 师妹 
Liu Mei
 into another Cultivation Furnace of his 
[
1
]
.

Has an endless amount of hate for 
Wang Lin
 and 
Zi Xin
.

 He was one of the chosens of the Suzaku. Schemed against the Suzaku, 
Zhu Quezi
. But actually fooled by him.

 Wang Lin used him for taking back his soul from 
Cultivation Planet Crystal
. Because if you want to take back your soul from this item, you should pay a price, and this is paid by Qian Feng, with his life.

His ancestor, 
Qian Pinghai
, fortunately found an ancient sword with rusts. Gift this sword to his family clan and said no one should use this sword if it is not for a life-death trial. Qian Feng used this sword against Wang Lin. But 
Tuo Sen
 took it from him and used it for breaking his seal in the Ancient God body. This sword's rusts was actually blood of a 9-star ancient god.

Death: Episode 102
